sections.heading: Introduction
sections.content: Slime is a Monster Loot item which is dropped by Slimes . Killing a single Slime can drop up to two Slime. Slime can also be obtained from Slime Balls or purchased from Krobus for data-sort-value="10"> 10g on Mondays (up to 50 per Monday). It may randomly appear in the Traveling Cart for data-sort-value="15" 100–1,000g. A Slimejack Fish Pond may also produce 10, 30, or 50 Slime daily when the population reaches 9.

sections.heading: Bundles
sections.content: 99 Slime is one of the options for the Adventurer's Bundle in the Boiler Room .

sections.heading: Recipes
sections.content: The color of the resulting slime egg is random, but the cheaper ones are more common. See Slime Egg-Press for the list of probabilities.

sections.heading: Tailoring
sections.content: Slime is used in the spool of the Sewing Machine to create a Shirt .

sections.heading: Quests
sections.content:
- 20 Slime are requested by Slimejack in a Fish Pond quest to increase the capacity of the pond from 1 to 3.
- 5 Slime may be requested by Bullhead or Largemouth Bass in a Fish Pond quest to increase the capacity of the pond from 3 to 5.
- 99 Slime may be requested by the Raccoon at the Giant Stump as part of his fifth request, or as part of any request starting with the sixth.

sections.heading: History
sections.content:
- 1.4 : Sturdy Ring now uses 25 Slime to craft. Slime can now be used in Tailoring. Can be requested in Fish Pond quests . Can be produced by Fish Ponds.
- 1.5 : Added Monster Musk recipe.
- 1.6 : May now be requested by the Raccoon. Is no longer a possible Midnight Carp Fish Pond request.

rows: A shimmering, gelatinous glob with no smell.
